description: G. Willi-Food International Ltd. designs, imports, markets, and distributes food products under the Willi-Food and Euro European Dairies brand name worldwide. The company offers canned vegetables and pickles, including mushrooms, artichoke, beans, asparagus, capers, corn kernels, baby corn, palm hearts, vine leaves, sour pickles, mixed pickled vegetables, pickled peppers, olives, garlic, roasted eggplant, sun and dried tomatoes; canned fish, such as tuna, sardines, anchovies, smoked and pressed cod liver, herring, fish paste, and salmon; and canned fruits, including pineapple, peaches, apricot
